title: Account
description: JSON Schema definition for the General Ledger Accounts table in MoneyWorks, including enums for Type and System fields and improved field descriptions. Internal Name: Account.

SequenceNumber.description: Internal unique identifier for the account record.

LastModifiedTime.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the account record was modified.

Code.description: The unique code used to identify the account (up to 7 characters, plus potentially a hyphen and department code).

Type.description: Defines the fundamental type of the account, determining its behaviour and placement in financial reports. Indexed.

enumDescriptions.C: CS - Cost of Sales (Expenses directly related to sales)
enumDescriptions.A: CA - Current Asset (e.g., bank accounts, cash, short-term assets)
enumDescriptions.F: FA - Fixed Asset (Long-life assets like buildings, equipment)
enumDescriptions.T: TA - Term Asset (Longer-term assets like term deposits)
enumDescriptions.M: TL - Term Liability (Longer-term obligations like mortgages)
enumDescriptions.H: SF - Shareholders Funds / Equity (Owner's equity in the company)

Group.description: The code of the Department Group associated with this account, used for departmental reporting (Gold/Datacentre only). Indexed.

Category.description: The primary category code for the account, used for grouping accounts for reporting and enquiry. May be empty. References the General table (Kind='C'). Indexed.

Description.description: The descriptive name of the account, often displayed in reports. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

PandL.description: For non-balance sheet accounts (Income, Sales, Expense, Cost of Sales), specifies the Profit & Loss account code into which the balance is transferred at year-end. Indexed.

TaxCode.description: The default Tax Code used for transactions involving this account. References the TaxRate table. (Mutable: conditionally)

Flags.description: A bitmask field storing various boolean settings/attributes for the account, such as 'Use as Heading', 'Job Code Required', 'Discountable'.

System.description: Indicates if the account is a system control account. Indexed.

Created.description: Timestamp indicating when the account record was created.

Category2.description: A secondary user-defined category code for reporting and analysis. May be empty. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Category3.description: A tertiary user-defined category code for reporting and analysis. May be empty. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Category4.description: A quaternary user-defined category code for reporting and analysis. May be empty. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

AccountantCode.description: The account code used by the external accountant, for mapping purposes (e.g., in Accountant's Export). May be empty. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Colour.description: A user-assigned colour index (0-7) for visual identification in lists. Labels are user-defined in preferences. (Mutable: conditionally)

Currency.description: The currency code (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR') for foreign currency accounts. Empty for base currency accounts. Requires multi-currency feature (Gold).

SecurityLevel.description: Security level assigned to the account (0-5 stars), restricting access based on user security levels (Gold/Datacentre only). Indexed.

BankAccountNumber.description: The bank account number associated with this account (only applicable for Bank type accounts). Used for electronic payments. May be empty. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

BalanceLimit.description: A user-defined balance limit for the account, potentially used for credit limits or overdraft warnings.

ManualChequeNumber.description: The next sequence number for manually written cheques drawn on this bank account.

PrintedChequeNumber.description: The next sequence number for cheques printed by MoneyWorks drawn on this bank account.

LastStatementImport.description: Timestamp of the last imported bank statement for this account.

Comments.description: User-entered notes or comments about the account. May be empty. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

ManualChequeNumDigits.description: Specifies the number of digits for padding the ManualChequeNumber (for bank accounts).

PrintedChequeNumDigits.description: Specifies the number of digits for padding the PrintedChequeNumber (for bank accounts).

UserNum.description: A user-defined number field for custom data storage, often used by scripts. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

UserText.description: A user-defined text field for custom data storage, often used by scripts. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

TaggedText.description: Stores key-value pairs for custom data, primarily accessed via scripting functions GetTaggedValue/SetTaggedValue. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

FeedID.description: Identifier related to bank feeds service for this bank account. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Cashflow.description: Assigns the account to a category (Operating, Investing, Financing) for the Statement of Cash Flows report. Codes typically start 'OP', 'INV', 'FIN'. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

Cashforecast.description: Defines the cash spread pattern (e.g., '10/60/30') for the Cash Forecast report, overriding default income/expense spreads. (Mutable: freely, script-only)

EBITDA.description: Classifies the account for EBITDA reporting purposes (Earnings Before Interest, Tax, Depreciation, and Amortization). (Mutable: conditionally)

ImportFormat.description: Specifies the format to use when importing bank statements for this specific bank account.
